::: {#fig-wcgs-swimmer}

```{r}
#| code-fold: true

wcgs <- readRDS(fs::path_package("rme", "extdata/wcgs.rds"))
# swimplot expects base data.frame column indexing.
wcgs <- as.data.frame(wcgs)
n_per_personality_display <- 40
days_per_year <- 365.25

wcgs_swimmer <- wcgs[
  !is.na(wcgs$time169) & !is.na(wcgs$chd69) & !is.na(wcgs$dibpat),
]
wcgs_swimmer <- wcgs_swimmer[
  order(wcgs_swimmer$dibpat, -wcgs_swimmer$time169),
]
wcgs_swimmer <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(
    split(wcgs_swimmer, wcgs_swimmer$dibpat),
    function(df_type) {
      n_take <- min(n_per_personality_display, nrow(df_type))
      df_type[seq_len(n_take), ]
    }
  )
)

wcgs_swimmer$display_id <- paste("Participant", seq_len(nrow(wcgs_swimmer)))
wcgs_swimmer$start <- 0.1
wcgs_swimmer$end_years <- wcgs_swimmer$time169 / days_per_year
# dibpat stores behavior pattern labels
# (Type A or Type B).
# Convert to character
# for swimplot fill mapping.
wcgs_swimmer$personality_type <- as.character(wcgs_swimmer$dibpat)

wcgs_events <- wcgs_swimmer[wcgs_swimmer$chd69 == "Yes", ]
if (nrow(wcgs_events) > 0) {
  wcgs_events$event <- "CHD event"
  wcgs_events$time <- wcgs_events$end_years
}

wcgs_plot <- swimplot::swimmer_plot(
  df = wcgs_swimmer,
  id = "display_id",
  start = "start",
  end = "end_years",
  name_fill = "personality_type",
  identifiers = FALSE,
  width = 0.8
) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Follow-up time (years)",
    y = "Participant",
    fill = "Personality type",
    shape = "Outcome"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(
    ~dibpat,
    ncol = 1,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = ggplot2::labeller(
      dibpat = c(
        "Type A" = "Type A behavior pattern",
        "Type B" = "Type B behavior pattern"
      )
    )
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

if (nrow(wcgs_events) > 0) {
  wcgs_plot <- wcgs_plot +
    swimplot::swimmer_points(
      df_points = wcgs_events,
      id = "display_id",
      time = "time",
      name_shape = "event",
      size = 2.8
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(values = c("CHD event" = 17))
}

wcgs_plot
```

Swimmer chart
using observed WCGS participant data.
Bars show observed follow-up time,
and triangles indicate CHD events.
`time169` is recorded in days
and converted to years for plotting.
For readability,
the figure displays up to 40 participants
per personality type,
with one facet for each type.

:::
